home · work · log · contact

first post!

April 3, 2026

so…what do i do?

i’m not sure. i’ll take it one step at a time and see where i go.

testing markdown!

oh, yeah. this is exciting.

  • i’ve used md before for project, but never for blog posts.
  • it’s definitely going to take some getting used to…

what’s next?

we’ll see.
